# Phase 65: Admin Standalone + Distribution - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-03-28
**Status:** Ready for planning
**Mode:** Auto-generated (autonomous mode)

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

The admin panel has its own authentication independent of OpenClaw, operators can manage multiple workspaces, and integration materials are publicly available. Standalone admin auth, workspace management, SKILL.md v4, landing page + docs site.

</domain>

<decisions>
## Implementation Decisions

### Claude's Discretion
All implementation choices are at Claude's discretion. Key areas:
- Workspace CRUD UI components
- SKILL.md v4 format (Chatlytics API key + MCP references)
- Landing page design (single HTML or React)
- Docs site approach (markdown or React pages)

</decisions>
